/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_main.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_cgame.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_cin.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_console.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_input.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_keys.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_net_chan.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_parse.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_scrn.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/cl_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/snd_dma.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/snd_mem.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/snd_mix.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/snd_adpcm.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/client/snd_wavelet.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/unix/linux_glimp_glfw.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/unix/unix_main_glfw.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/unix/linux_snd_pulse.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/unix/unix_shared.c.o CMakeFiles/wolfsp.dir/src/unix/unix_net.c.o -o wolfsp  libqcommon.a libsplines.a librenderer.a libbotlib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -lpulse-simple -lpulse -lfreetype -ljpeg -lpthread -lm -ldl
